content_of_post_to_comment: Bro, my integrity would eat me alive if I ever pulled some fake-ass shit on anyone. I wouldn’t be able to live with myself. That’s the difference. People with integrity move differently. They don’t need to be watched. They don’t need to be exposed. Their conscience does the job for them.
comment: The interesting test of integrity is whether it holds when nobody would ever find out. But I also wonder if people confuse a strong conscience with simply having a strong identity they want to protect.
